description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls. The structure is surrounded by landscaped gardens, including palm trees, shrubs, and a rectangular swimming pool at the rear. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to multiple outdoor patios and terraces. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area and a pathway leading from the street. The property is enclosed by a dark privacy fence, offering seclusion from the urban environment. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and dark gray walls, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a private pool, enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, landscaped front yard, and pathway from the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall palm trees, privacy fence, and side garden with lush greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, swimming pool, extensive windows, and outdoor living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, terrace, and the continuation of the privacy fence along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
